data.content: Implementation complete. Branch: codex/43ee-repo-browser-clipping. Commit: 2525f03c96abcb0483cfe066f6cfdd063cef9848. Root cause: BreadcrumbNav was a shrinkable flex child inside the repository browser dialog; with the dialog height constrained and the directory list reserving 300px, the breadcrumb collapsed to 0px height and its Home/~ children bled out above the Up button. Fix: gave the breadcrumb and fixed controls non-shrinking layout classes, let the dialog use a viewport-aware max-height with vertical scrolling, preserved the directory list scroll region, and added a hermetic layout class regression test. Validation: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build, and Playwright modal metrics/screenshot all passed.
